channel.title: Noticias Forex — Global Investing
channel.description: Noticias forex de alto impacto en tiempo real con análisis fundamental para las 8 divisas G8.

item.title: Fed: War fog clouds rate path – BNY
item.description: BNY strategist John Velis says the March FOMC broadly matched expectations, with no rate change and minimal forward guidance, while markets swiftly repriced toward a more hawkish path. Fuente: FXStreet

item.title: This oil analysis today at shows sellers may come out well
item.description: The oil market is currently navigating a period of extreme volatility as geopolitical headlines clash with rapid shifts in diplomatic sentiment. Just a day after crude oil futures plunged over 10% —settling near $88.13 following a temporary postponement of strikes on Iranian energy assets—the narrative has shifted back toward escalation. Fresh repo... Fuente: InvestingLive

item.title: USD/CAD Price Forecast: Jumps to almost a fresh two-month high near 1.3760
item.description: The USD/CAD pair trades 0.25% higher to near 1.3760 during the early European session on Tuesday, the highest level seen in almost two months. Fuente: FXStreet

item.title: BoJ’s Ueda says to expect underlying inflation to accelerate moderately
item.description: Bank of Japan (BoJ) Governor Kazuo Ueda said on Tuesday that he expects underlying inflation to accelerate moderately. Ueda added that he will guide monetary policy appropriately to stably achieve our inflation target accompanied by wage gains. Fuente: FXStreet

item.title: EUR/GBP holds steady ahead of Eurozone, UK PMI data
item.description: The EUR/GBP cross trades on a flat note around 0.8650 during the early European session on Tuesday. The pair faces a volatile session amid escalating geopolitical tensions in the Middle East and shifting expectations for central bank policy. Fuente: FXStreet

item.title: BOJ governor Ueda says underlying inflation is expected to accelerate moderately
item.description: Tight labour market, firmer wages will keep in place cycle in which wages and prices rise in tandem Temporary freeze to food sales tax may briefly push down inflation But it is likely to have a limited impact on inflation expectations as a whole BOJ will guide monetary policy appropriately to stably achieve inflation target accompanied by wage gain... Fuente: ForexLive

item.title: Gold adds to intraday losses as emerging Fed rate hike bets underpin USD
item.description: Gold (XAU/USD) meets with a fresh supply during the Asian session on Tuesday and stalls the overnight recovery from a four-month low, around the $4,100 mark, representing a technically significant 200-day Simple Moving Average (SMA). Fuente: FXStreet

item.title: Market jitters start to creep in again after the cautious optimism yesterday
item.description: The early moves today are a pullback to what we saw in trading yesterday. Oil prices are up and so are Treasury yields, which in turn are weighing on equities and precious metals again. And in the major currencies space, the dollar is once again creeping higher across the board. Putting aside all the noise about whether or not there were talks betw... Fuente: ForexLive

item.title: Movement along Strait of Hormuz said to still be very tightly controlled for now
item.description: A bit of an update, with Kpler's intel source Amena Bakr reporting on the matter. She says that "a number of LPG vessels crossed the strait yesterday and headed towards India". Adding that "the strait is not closed, but the passage of vessels is tightly controlled by Iran and vessels need to seek permission before passing". I don't believe that's m... Fuente: ForexLive

item.title: USD/CHF rebounds toward 0.7900 as safe-haven demand boosts US Dollar
item.description: USD/CHF has recovered its recent losses from the previous day, trading around 0.7880 during the Asian session on Tuesday. The pair gains ground as the US Dollar (USD) receives support amid rising geopolitical tensions. Fuente: FXStreet

item.title: investingLive Asia-Pacific FX news wrap: Oil rebounds after sharp drop
item.description: Australian inflation data due Wednesday, March 25, 2026. Preview. WSJ: Gulf states edge toward war with Iran as Saudi signals imminent entry Central banks seen sustaining gold demand amid geopolitics and dedollarisation Japan core inflation slips below target as subsidies mask underlying price pressures PBOC sets USD/ CNY reference rate for today a... Fuente: ForexLive

item.title: Australian inflation data due Wednesday, March 25, 2026. Preview.
item.description: Westpac sees Australia CPI steady but flags energy-driven upside risks. In brief from their preview. Summary: February CPI seen at 0.1% m/m, 3.8% y/y (unchanged) Trimmed mean expected 0.3% m/m, 3.4% y/y Inflation momentum steady but still above target band February data pre-dates Middle East energy shock Fuel prices fell in February, masking underl... Fuente: ForexLive

item.title: WSJ: Gulf states edge toward war with Iran as Saudi signals imminent entry
item.description: Gulf states are moving closer to joining the conflict with Iran, with Saudi Arabia signalling a potential shift toward direct military involvement. Wall Street Journal ( gated ) report. Summary: Gulf states moving closer to direct involvement in conflict with Iran Saudi Arabia allows US use of key air base, signalling deeper alignment Crown Prince ... Fuente: InvestingLive

item.title: Japan core CPI falls to 1.7% in February, as energy costs drag inflation lower
item.description: Japan’s inflation slowed further in February, with core CPI (ex-fresh food) easing from 2.0% yoy to 1.6% yoy, below expectations of 1.7% yoy. The drop pushed core inflation below the Bank of Japan’s 2% target for the first time in nearly four years, largely reflecting government measures to curb electricity costs. The decline was driven […] T... Fuente: ActionForex

item.title: Japan PMI composite falls to 52.5, war lifts costs and hits sentiment
item.description: Japan’s private sector growth lost momentum in March as PMI data showed a broad-based slowdown across both manufacturing and services. PMI Manufacturing fell from 53.0 to 51.4, PMI Services eased from 53.8 to 52.8, and PMI Composite declined from 53.9 to 52.5, pointing to softer expansion after a strong start to the year. The slowdown […] The... Fuente: ActionForex

item.title: Canadian Dollar softens amid Middle East tension
item.description: The USD/CAD pair gathers strength to around 1.3750 during the Asian trading hours on Tuesday. Uncertainty and the ongoing US-Israel war on Iran continue to boost the US Dollar (USD) against the Canadian Dollar (CAD). Fuente: FXStreet

item.title: FX Watch: AUD/CHF and AUD/CAD Bounce Setups for a Strong Australian CPI
item.description: Interest rate hike expectations are running pretty high for the RBA, so a hotter inflation print could seal the deal for May. Here’s what I’m watching on AUD/CHF and AUD/CAD if this happens. Fuente: BabyPips

item.title: Central banks seen sustaining gold demand amid geopolitics and dedollarisation
item.description: Central banks are expected to keep buying gold amid geopolitical risks and diversification trends, though elevated prices and market dynamics may temper the pace. Summary: Central banks expected to remain active gold buyers in 2026 New and previously inactive buyers entering the market Recent purchases seen from Indonesia, Malaysia and Guatemala De... Fuente: InvestingLive

item.title: RBNZ’s Breman warns of inflation spike but cautions against overreaction
item.description: RBNZ Governor Anna Breman warned that the Middle East conflict is likely to push New Zealand’s economy into a more challenging environment of higher inflation and weaker growth. Speaking today, she said policymakers expect “higher headline inflation over the near term, and somewhat weaker growth momentum,” highlighting the stagflationary nature of ... Fuente: ActionForex

item.title: Japan core inflation slips below target as subsidies mask underlying price pressures
item.description: Japan inflation slowed on subsidies, but underlying price pressures remain firm, keeping the BoJ’s tightening path intact. Summary: Headline CPI slows to 1.3% y/y (prev 1.5%, est 1.3%) Core CPI (ex fresh food) drops to 1.6% (prev 2.0%, est 1.7%), below BoJ target Core-core CPI (ex food, energy) holds at 2.5% (prev 2.6%, est 2.4%) Energy subsidies a... Fuente: ForexLive

item.title: FX Watch: AUD/USD and EUR/AUD Retracement Zones If Australia CPI Misses Expectations
item.description: A softer Australia CPI could spark retracements in AUD/USD and EUR/AUD, but hawkish RBA signals may keep AUD’s downside moves limited. Fuente: BabyPips

item.title: Event Guide: U.K. CPI Report (February 2026)
item.description: With the BOE leaning towards tightening policy to combat oil-related price pressures, will the upcoming CPI report be enough to convince traders that a rate hike is imminent? Here’s what to look out for. Fuente: BabyPips

item.title: Japanese Yen softens as CPI inflation cools to four-year low in February
item.description: The USD/JPY pair holds positive ground near 158.55 during the early Asian session on Tuesday. The Japanese Yen (JPY) softens against the US Dollar (USD) after the cooler-than-expected inflation report. Fuente: FXStreet

item.title: Event Guide: Australia’s CPI Report (February 2026)
item.description: The RBA just hiked twice in a row. Will February’s inflation data seal the deal on a third? Here are points to know if you’re trading Australia’s CPI report! Fuente: BabyPips

item.title: PBOC is expected to set the USD/CNY reference rate at 6.8840 – Reuters estimate
item.description: The People’s Bank of China is due to set the daily USD/CNY reference rate at around 0115 GMT (2115 US Eastern time), a fixing that remains one of the most closely watched signals in Asian foreign exchange markets. China operates a managed floating exchange rate system, under which the renminbi (yuan) is allowed to trade within a prescribed band aro... Fuente: ForexLive

item.title: Iran's Fars report gas infrastructure hit as conflict broadens to energy assets
item.description: Strikes on Iran’s gas infrastructure highlight rising risks to energy systems as the conflict broadens, with potential implications for supply and market stability. Summary: Projectile reported to have struck gas pipeline feeding Khorramshahr power station Additional gas-related facilities hit in Isfahan, including pressure reduction station Report... Fuente: InvestingLive

item.title: Japan core CPI moderates in February
item.description: Japan inflation data for February 2026. Earlier: February Tokyo data showed underlying price pressures moderating - This article was written by Eamonn Sheridan at investinglive.com. Fuente: ForexLive

item.title: Deutsche Bank sees ECB hiking to 2.5% as energy shock lifts inflation
item.description: Deutsche Bank turns more hawkish on the ECB, arguing that energy-driven inflation risks now outweigh growth concerns, though the policy outlook remains highly uncertain. Summary: Deutsche Bank shifts ECB call in response to Middle East conflict Now expects ECB to hike rates to 2.50% in 2026 Two 25bp hikes seen in June and September Energy shock dri... Fuente: ForexLive

item.title: RBNZ’s Breman flags near-term inflation rise, warns on second-round risks
item.description: Breman signalled higher near-term inflation but stressed a conditional response, with policy hinging on cost pass-through and second-round effects. Summary Breman reiterates near-term inflation lift driven by energy shock Growth expected to soften alongside rising costs Focus on whether firms pass through costs or absorb margins Monitoring for seco... Fuente: ForexLive

item.title: USD/CAD: Cautiously bullish, waiting for a decisive break above 1.3730
item.description: The USD/CAD pair had a volatile day driven by geopolitical shifts (Trump/Iran) and a massive drop in crude oil, which offset USD weakness. This analysis breaks down the pair's rotational pattern near 1.3715, explores future drivers like Fed remarks and trade tariffs, and offers a cautiously bullish technical outlook targeting 1.3800. Fuente: MarketPulse
